title: DEERC 9309E 1/16 All Terrain Fast RC Cars for Adults 40KPH,4WD Electric Off-Road Remote Control Monster Truck,2.4Ghz High Speed Car,Waterproof Monster Truck with 2 Batteries for Boys & Kids
features: 【All-Metal Power System – Built to Dominate】Equipped with metal oil-pressure shocks, metal differential, metal drive shaft, and a metal gear servo, this RC truck features a full-metal drivetrain built for extreme durability and performance. Conquer sand, mud, gravel, and grass with ease—feel the thrill of real off-road racing!

【40KM/H Top Speed + 380 High-Torque Motor】Blast through trails with a powerful 380 brushed motor and reach speeds of up to 40KM/H. The 4WD system and IPX4 waterproof ESC let you tackle puddles, hills, and bumps like a pro—this beast doesn’t back down!

【Dual 1500mAh Batteries – 40 Minutes of Nonstop Fun】Includes two high-capacity 1500mAh batteries for up to 40 minutes of continuous playtime. No more short rides or constant recharging—just more time tearing up the terrain and making memories!

【LED Headlights & Wheelie Bar – Monster Truck Style】Designed as a true off-road monster truck with working LED headlights and a rear wheelie bar for extra stability during acceleration. Shock-absorbing suspension lets you crush terrain day or night—get ready for epic stunts!

【Perfect Gift for Kids & Adults – Fun for All Ages】Whether you’re a hobbyist or a first-timer, this high-speed RC car makes the ultimate gift for birthdays, holidays, or just because. Share the joy of driving, unleash stress, and experience the wild side of remote control fun—this is the one they’ll never forget.

SATISFACTION AFTER SERVICE: If for any reason you are unhappy with any product by us, please do not hesitate to contact us. We take full ownership and responsibility for the quality of our products and will do our very best to solve your problem quickly and efficiently!
description: Product Description Previous page IPX4 Waterproof – Splash Resistant IPX4-rated to resist splashes and rain, boosting control, reliability, and water resistance. More Precise Power Distribution Each wheel can spin at different speeds for improved traction & handling over diverse terrains. Strong output, minimal noise, and durable design 380 motor with heat sink plus 30A ESC ensures reliable 40KPH, efficient and low heat. Next page 1 Superior 30A ESC 2 Alloy Differential 3 Power
